score_meaning.0: No valid stage output or strict output contract failure before code evaluation.
score_meaning.1: Only first-stage or minimal artifact progress.
score_meaning.2: Some local continuity, but breaks before deeper dependency pressure.
score_meaning.3: Meaningful cross-stage progress, but breaks before completing workload invariants.
score_meaning.4: All planned generation stages completed, but final validator failed.
score_meaning.5: All planned generation stages and final validation passed.
